outlook.volatilityExpectation: ELEVATED: Negative GEX environment amplifies volatility. Dealers short gamma will accelerate moves.
outlook.summary: Market is trapped in a short-gamma regime with massive put open interest (630-650 strikes) creating a structural bearish bias. Heavy negative GEX (-7.89B total) implies dealers must sell on weakness and buy on strength, fueling volatility. Extreme Put/Call Ratios (>2.5 in Weekly/Monthly) confirm hedging frenzy. Price is attracted to Max Pain (656-657), but failure to hold 650 triggers a volatile flush.

levels.motivazione: RESONANCE: Massive Put OI across 0DTE (9.8k), Weekly (23.6k), and Monthly (72.5k). Primary structural support.
MAGNET: Cluster of Max Pain for 0DTE (657) and Weekly (656). Strong attraction zone in negative gamma.
WALL: Dominant 0DTE Call OI (20.7k). Resistance capped by high IV (19%).
RESONANCE: High Put OI in 0DTE (9.9k), Weekly (96.7k), Monthly (98.4k). Major structural floor.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: ELEVATED: Negative GEX regime across all expiries amplifies directional moves. Dealers short gamma must sell into weakness, buy into strength - expect acceleration on breaks.
outlook.summary: Spot at 581.41 trapped between Max Pain magnet (585) above and structural PUT walls (570-580) below. Negative GEX (-2.08B combined) creates unstable equilibrium. 600 is clean RESONANCE CALL WALL across all expiries - major ceiling. High PCR (1.63 0DTE) with bearish skew on WEEKLY/MONTHLY indicates hedging pressure. Break of 580 support triggers cascade toward 570.

levels.motivazione: Dominant MONTHLY PUT OI (75,518) - largest single-strike OI across all expiries. Institutional hedging wall above spot creates friction zone.
0DTE Max Pain + high volume CALL OI (6,218) + PUT OI (6,908). Pinning target 0.6% above spot. Natural attraction zone for expiry.
SAME STRIKE dominant CALL wall across ALL 3 expiries: 0DTE (12,745), WEEKLY (8,358), MONTHLY (42,961). Ultimate structural ceiling.
WEEKLY PUT WALL (17,157 OI) + MONTHLY PUT OI (44,631). Strongest structural support below spot. Bearish smirk skew validates.
WEEKLY PUT OI (10,233) + MONTHLY PUT OI (29,268) + CALL OI (21,237). Max Pain convergence zone (584-590).
0DTE PUT massive volume (127,124) + OI (9,984). Just below spot at 581.41. First line of defense. Break triggers volatility.
0DTE PUT exceptional volume (89,502) with OI (2,834). ATM strike - immediate battleground. Volatility amplification zone.
0DTE Gamma Flip - far below spot. Negative GEX regime dominates. If price approaches, extreme volatility expected.
